form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 8 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1600m, 2.75 len behind Boogiefied with 60kg at $13.50. Before that 8th of 12 at this track on February 22 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Chasingtherainbow with 60kg at $67. Needs plenty of luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). At the latest run 5th of 8 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1600m, 2.75 len behind Boogiefied with 60kg at $13.50. Before that 8th of 12 at this track on February 22 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Chasingtherainbow with 60kg at $67. Needs plenty of luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the stalls, made contact with Tenpenny.
Hanging out and shifted out in the latter stages.
Had Diamond Rock close to its heels at the 150m.
At the 1500m, carried outwards for a short distance by We Have Touchdown.
After racing into the lead, commenced to hang out and shifted out.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Not raced for 54 days. Resuming 8th of 10 at this track on January 13 over 1800m, 6 len behind Tenpenny carrying 54kg at $13.50. Last start 4th of 8 at Durbanville on February 11 over 2000m, 2.5 len behind Tenpenny with 54kg at $8. Will be doing best work late.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5.5). Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Not raced for 54 days. Resuming 8th of 10 at this track on January 13 over 1800m, 6 len behind Tenpenny carrying 54kg at $13.50. Last start 4th of 8 at Durbanville on February 11 over 2000m, 2.5 len behind Tenpenny with 54kg at $8. Will be doing best work late.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped by Blind Date and made contact with Captains Alliance.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At debut, 7th of 12 at this track on February 22 over 1600m, 4 len behind Chasingtherainbow with 57kg at $17. Second-up second last of 8 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1600m, 5 len behind Boogiefied carrying 57kg at $13.50. Limited galloper who might need an easier race.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Raced twice to date. At debut, 7th of 12 at this track on February 22 over 1600m, 4 len behind Chasingtherainbow with 57kg at $17. Second-up second last of 8 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1600m, 5 len behind Boogiefied carrying 57kg at $13.50. Limited galloper who might need an easier race.

form.formComment: Most recently 4th of 8 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1600m, 2.5 len behind Boogiefied with 55.5kg at $9. Before that second last of 8 at Durbanville on February 11 over 2000m, 5.5 len behind Tenpenny carrying 57kg at $21. Likely to play a big role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Most recently 4th of 8 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1600m, 2.5 len behind Boogiefied with 55.5kg at $9. Before that second last of 8 at Durbanville on February 11 over 2000m, 5.5 len behind Tenpenny carrying 57kg at $21. Likely to play a big role.

form.formComment: At the latest run 7th of 11 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Prairie Dawn with 59.5kg at $15. The race before that 7th of 9 at this track on February 25 over 1600m, 6 len behind In A Timely Manner carrying 61kg at $17. Needs to find lengths to test these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(7). At the latest run 7th of 11 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Prairie Dawn with 59.5kg at $15. The race before that 7th of 9 at this track on February 25 over 1600m, 6 len behind In A Timely Manner carrying 61kg at $17. Needs to find lengths to test these.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On entering the straight, directed towards the outside of the racecourse.

form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation by 2.5 len this track G3 Final Fling Stakes January 31 over 2000m defeating Lavender Bay with 57.5kg at $26. First up last campaign third of 8 at Durbanville September 27 over 2000m, 2.25 len behind Landoftherisingsun with 59.5kg at $9. Winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9.5). Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation by 2.5 len this track G3 Final Fling Stakes January 31 over 2000m defeating Lavender Bay with 57.5kg at $26. First up last campaign third of 8 at Durbanville September 27 over 2000m, 2.25 len behind Landoftherisingsun with 59.5kg at $9. Winning hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped awkwardly. Carried Lady Silvano inwards leaving the 100m.

form.formComment: Comes off a 54 day let-up. Last start 2nd of 8 at Durbanville on February 11 over 2000m, 0.8 len behind Tenpenny carrying 60kg at $3.50. The race before that 6th of 10 at this track in the G2 Midmar Premier Trophy on January 10 over 1800m, 4.5 len behind Okavango carrying 58kg at $41. Can improve again. Top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5.5). Comes off a 54 day let-up. Last start 2nd of 8 at Durbanville on February 11 over 2000m, 0.8 len behind Tenpenny carrying 60kg at $3.50. The race before that 6th of 10 at this track in the G2 Midmar Premier Trophy on January 10 over 1800m, 4.5 len behind Okavango carrying 58kg at $41. Can improve again. Top chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Shortly after the start, brushed inwards by Song To The Moon.
Slow into stride. Hanging out from the 300m.
Approaching the 100m, directed outwards and into clear running.
At the 200m had to be directed away from the heels of Diamond Rock.
Slight contact with Green Isle on jumping.
